releases.author: somesanity
releases.description: # changelog update context menu before: after:

releases.author: somesanity
releases.description:
# Fixes

- Fix issue with [resizing image](https://obsidian.md/changelog/#:~:text=Image%20resizing,to%20reset%20the%20image%20size%2E) in the new obsidian update [1.12.4](https://obsidian.md/changelog/2026-02-27-desktop-v1.12.4/)
- Fix issue with internal link, where the link is breaking when you paste the link with | symbol

>webapp was updated to [29.5.2](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio/commit/b2a9aa13dcb036f64a35c5386748efd4719d0701)

>delete the `webapp` folder in the plugin directory; the plugin will download the new client version automatically.)
releases.name: 2.2.1 (HotFix)

releases.author: somesanity
releases.description:
## New

- Canvas Support:
    - Added support for internal and external links.
    - Added support for Markdown fragments.
    - Added canvas-specific diagram settings.
    - Draw.io Integration: Added support for editing `.drawio` extensions.
    - New Commands: Added a command to set a name for new diagrams.
    - Added a setting to adjust diagram size in the popover window.

## Fixes

- Fixed a bug in edit mode where diagrams would not resize correctly.

## Changes
- Editing diagrams via the context menu now opens in the editor view instead of a modal.
- The view title now automatically updates to match the diagram name.
- the draw.io client update to [29.3.6](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio/commit/8b988d670049c4cbf1713decab0e922d94533b91)
    > delete the `webapp` folder in the plugin directory; the plugin will download the new client version automatically.)

releases.author: somesanity
releases.description:
# 2.1.0

## Changelog

### Updates & new

- Diagrams in Obsidian's edit mode now display size and are centered
- Updated draw.io client to [28.2.5](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio/commit/eaae294cba5010e3a9d04b685407e79512f88d2d)
  *(Note: delete the `webapp` folder in the plugin directory; the plugin will download the new client version automatically.)*
- new command: open draw.io editor


### Fixes

- Fixed saving issue when several editors are open
- Fixed hidden link tooltip bug
- Fixed duplicate option in the context menu

releases.author: somesanity
releases.description: fix encoding in drawio view - before fix: - after fix:

releases.author: somesanity
releases.description:
# ✨ Interactive diagrams

![docs/demo.gif](docs/interactiveDiagram-demo.gif)

### 🖇️ Linking shapes with notes & external links

To link your notes or external resources to shapes, right-click on a shape in the editor and select `Add link`. Then, insert the link to your note or external resource.

🔗 linking notes demo:

![docs/demo.gif](docs/linkingnotedemo.gif)

🌐 creating an external link demo:

![docs/demo.gif](docs/linking-external-resources.gif)

### 📄 Markdown fragments

**Markdown fragments** are pieces of markdown that you can add to diagrams.

Right-click on the shape or element you want to bind a markdown fragment to, then select `Add data...`.  
The data name should follow the pattern `md-number`, for example: `md-1`, `md-2`.  
Next, insert the markdown text into the property.

📜 Adding a markdown fragment demo:

![docs/demo.gif](/docs//markdown-fragment-demo.gif)

## other updates

- support EN, RU languages
- add command for edit diagram from file explorer
- settings:
    - add default size setting
    - select folder for saving diagram
    - percent diagram size
    - use markdown links
    - centering diagrams
    - interactive diagrams
releases.name: Interactive diagrams with draw.io

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

- The draw.io client will now be automatically downloaded the first time the plugin is enabled. This only needs to be done once.

![auto-download-demo](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/225f9be4-a637-4c6c-9c72-b192ea22239d)


- The draw.io UI now adapts to both the light and dark themes of Obsidian.

![adaptation-theme-demo](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a5bb1748-184b-4bba-8de8-c95d2d54be02)

releases.author: somesanity
releases.description:
В данной версии плагин поддерживается редактирование и создание диаграмм при помощи, редактора draw.io. В настройка можно назначить сочетание клавиш при нажатии на которое диаграмма будет создаваться (в поле для ввода текста), и редактироваться, если навестить на вставленную диаграмму (`![[diagrama.drawio.svg]]`)

![изображение](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2624d7ca-705a-47c7-a96d-0e923d9a0845)
releases.name: first release draw.io plugin for obsidian
